languages.text: "Полно, Эоганн. Оставь блаженного в покое. Пусть медикарии Сектора Бионика обеспечат ему уход до самого конца".
"That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."
languages.original_text: "Полно, Эоганн. Оставь блаженного в покое. Пусть медикарии Сектора Бионика обеспечат ему уход до самого конца".

traits.locale_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."
"That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."
"You will be given the best care and treatment. You will serve in the Sector Bionica under the supervision of the chirurgeons and Genetors there."
"That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."
"That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

languages.text: 「最良の医療と治療を受けるだろう。外科医やジェネーターの監督の下で、バイオニカ部門で勤務することになる」
languages.original_text: "You will be given the best care and treatment. You will serve in the Sector Bionica under the supervision of the chirurgeons and Genetors there."

traits.locale_text: 「最良の医療と治療を受けるでしょう。外科医やジェネーターの監督の下で、バイオニカ部門で勤務することになります」

languages.text: “够了，伊奥贡。别管这个自得其乐的傻子了，让仿生区的医务官照料他到最后一刻吧。”
languages.original_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

traits.locale_text: “够了，伊奥贡。别管这个自得其乐的傻子了，让仿生区的医务官照料他到最后一刻吧。”

languages.text: « Ça suffit, Eogunn. Laissez ce pauvre bougre tranquille, les officiers de medicae du secteur Bionica prendront soin de lui jusqu'à ce qu'il rende son dernier souffle. »
languages.original_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

traits.locale_text: « Ça suffit, Eogunn. Laissez ce pauvre bougre tranquille, les officiers de medicae du secteur Bionica prendront soin de lui jusqu'à ce qu'il rende son dernier souffle. »

languages.text: «Ya basta, Eogunn. Deje estar a este feliz ignorante. Que el personal del Sector Bionica lo trate hasta su fin».
languages.original_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

traits.locale_text: «Ya basta, Eogunn. Deje estar a este feliz ignorante. Que el personal del Sector Bionica lo trate hasta su fin».

languages.text: "Bu kadar yeter Eogunn. Bu mutlu ahmağı kendi hâline bırak. Sektör Biyonika sıhhiyeleri son anına kadar onunla ilgilensin."
languages.original_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

traits.locale_text: "Bu kadar yeter Eogunn. Bu mutlu ahmağı kendi hâline bırak. Sektör Biyonika sıhhiyeleri son anına kadar onunla ilgilensin."

languages.text: "Das reicht, Eogunn. Lasst diesen seligen Narren in Ruhe, damit ihn die Medicae des Sektors Bionica bis zum Ende behandeln können."
languages.original_text: "That is enough, Eogunn. Leave this blissful fool be and let the medicae of the Sector Bionica tend to him until the end."

traits.locale_text: "Das reicht, Eogunn. Lasst diesen seligen Narren in Ruhe, damit ihn die Medicae des Sektors Bionica bis zum Ende behandeln können."
